text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I was walking toward the trainer's office, I spotted Victoire Pisa with a student who looked like a friend of hers.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Oh my… So that's what happened. 
A falling out with your roommate…

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Horsegirl Friend
text_block_list.text: Ugh, yeah～… I want to make up with her, but even when I try to talk to her, she just won't listen to me at all…!

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Horsegirl Friend
text_block_list.text: Jeez, I feel like I'm completely out of options! Pisaa, will you join me for some stress-eating!?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course. …Oh, why don't we go to the cafe in front of the station? They have a famous heaping fruit parfait… Actually, I've been curious about it for a while.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Please, take your time… and tell me all about it there. 
Let's look for a solution together.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Horsegirl Friend
text_block_list.text:
Pisa～…! You're so kind. 
It just makes me want to rely on you…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Yes, go right ahead. 
I'll be waiting for you anytime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Victoire Pisa will likely stay by her friend's side until she feels better. —A sight I've grown entirely used to seeing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I became her trainer… because I wanted to be a source of strength for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later in the trainer's office, I was at my computer, powering through my backlog of work, when—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have something to discuss regarding tomorrow's training—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…I apologize. It seems you're busy. 
Should I come back later?
choice_data_list: <size=38>No! I'll be done soon, so can you wait a bit?</size>
<size=38>No! I'll be done soon, so can you wait a bit?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Understood. It's not urgent, so please take your time.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…Oh… This plug is coming loose… 
That's dangerous…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …There, all good.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —Oh my, this one too!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Let's make sure you're connected firmly. 
So you don't come loose again.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Kya…!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The monitor blacked out. The wiring had short-circuited! 
I rushed over to her.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay. 
I'm so sorry, this is my fault—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Ah… Your computer? Is the data safe…!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I checked every inch of her hands. 
Checking for cuts, checking for burns—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I really am fine…! 
More importantly, your work data—
choice_data_list: <size=36>I can always redo the work. More importantly—</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After checking her hands over and over… 
It seemed she really was unhurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I was careless. I knew she had a habit of wanting to connect things. Yet I left the cords out without tidying them up…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…I'm sorry. To have caused such a thing… 
and made you worry so much…
choice_data_list: <size=32>It's fine. As long as you're safe, that's all that matters</size>
<size=32>It's fine. As long as you're safe, that's all that matters</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Trainer——……

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
(Such genuine, heartfelt relief on your face… 
Ah, Trainer really… cares about me…)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…So warm. Your feelings, your gaze, they always envelop me, 
no matter when…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yes, you always… take my hand and guide me, as if inviting me into the center of the circle…—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (…Hey, Trainer. I want to know more about you…)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (I want to make you even happier… more and more—)
choice_data_list: <size=38>…Pisa? Does it hurt somewhere after all?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …No. It's nothing at all—
